_comment: Digital Asset Links for the Best Family Vault TWA (Trusted Web Activity). Once filled in, this file proves to Android that the bestfamilyvault.vercel.app domain and the published .apk/.aab belong to the same owner — without it the TWA shows a browser URL bar at the top. SETUP: 1) run `bubblewrap init --manifest=https://bestfamilyvault.vercel.app/manifest.webmanifest`, 2) bubblewrap creates a keystore and prints the SHA256 fingerprint, 3) replace REPLACE_WITH_SHA256_FROM_BUBBLEWRAP below with that fingerprint (colons stay), 4) deploy + open https://bestfamilyvault.vercel.app/.well-known/assetlinks.json to confirm it serves, 5) install the APK on an Android device — no URL bar should appear. Update package_name below if you chose a different one during bubblewrap init.
